name: @macroforge/mcp-server
description: MCP server for Macroforge documentation and code analysis

exports.name: registerTools
exports.description: Registers all Macroforge MCP tools with the server instance. This function: 1. Loads documentation sections from disk 2. Registers a `tools/list` handler returning all available tools 3. Registers a `tools/call` handler routing requests to appropriate handlers The tools registered provide documentation access and code analysis capabilities for AI assistants working with Macroforge. ```

params.name: server
params.description: The MCP Server instance to register tools with
